invariants: Preserve exact silhouette and sole shape
Preserve exact strap layout and attachment logic
Preserve exact material appearance and finish
Preserve exact color family and contrast behavior
Preserve exact branding, printed text, and visible markings when present
allowed_transforms: Subtle lighting adaptation consistent with scene
Micro scale adaptation only if required by body proportion realism
forbidden: Any change in strap topology or closure logic
Any change in sole thickness or silhouette family
Any omission, corruption, or hallucination of branding or printed text
Any stylization that reduces catalog realism
placement_rules: Footwear must align naturally with foot pose
Footwear must maintain believable ground contact
Left-right pair consistency must be preserved
Footwear must not float, merge into foot, or deform at contact points
